title: phase-b-ship output
description: JSON emitted by phase-b-ship.sh. Covers Steps 13, 14, 15, 15b, 16, 16a, 16c of session-close Phase B. Partial completion is first-class: any sub-step can report status=not_attempted if a prior step failed. Exit 2 = merge conflict (partial JSON still emitted). Exit 0 = caller can reason about all sub-step outcomes including pipeline failures.

status.description: ok=kill attempted (even if no processes found), skipped=not in worktree or dry-run

killed.description: Portless process patterns that were killed

second_merge.description: Step 14: Second merge from main (catch up with changes during Phase A)

status.description: ok=merged cleanly, conflict=merge conflict (exit 2), skipped=on main branch or dry-run

merge_feature.description: Step 15: Merge feature branch into main (worktree only)

status.description: ok=merged into main, conflict=merge conflict (exit 2), skipped=not in worktree or dry-run, not_attempted=prior step failed

version.description: Step 15b: Version bump and tag creation

tag.description: Git tag created (e.g. v2026.04.77) or empty string

version.description: Version string written to VERSION file (e.g. 2026.04.77) or empty string

status.description: ok=pushed, failed=push error, screen_locked=macOS screen locked (push aborted), skipped=--skip-push or dry-run, not_attempted=prior step failed

detail.description: Error output on failure, flag reason on skip

status.description: passed=CI green, failed=CI red (beads must NOT be closed), skipped_*=non-blocking skip

run_url.description: GitHub Actions run URL (when status is passed or failed)

plugin_cache.description: Step 16c: Plugin cache sync after push

status.description: ok=cache synced, skipped=not a plugin repo or dry-run, not_attempted=push failed so skip
